content:
⚖️ Most Important Supreme Court Judgments – June 2026

The Supreme Court delivered several landmark rulings in June 2026, strengthening constitutional rights and clarifying important legal principles. From recognising the right to walk safely on footpaths as a fundamental right to protecting human trafficking survivors, valuing the unpaid work of homemakers, reaffirming the right to speedy investigation, and clarifying the scope of judicial review in election matters, these judgments have significant implications for citizens, legal professionals, and judiciary aspirants. Stay updated with the latest legal developments and explore these important decisions in one place on LegalRath.

Link - https://lnkd.in/dMKmfvUB
